title: MasterClass Pan Handle Sleeve Set for Cast Aluminium Casserole Dishes, Easy Grip Silicone, 3 Pieces, Black
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: What You'll Get - Mcottage 3 Piece Silicone Pan Handle Sleeve Set, perfect for protecting your hands from hot handles while cooking.
Superior Heat Protection - Made of high-quality silicone, these pan handle sleeves provide excellent heat resistance up to 230°C, ensuring a safe and comfortable cooking experience.
Easy to Clean and Store - These pan handle sleeves are dishwasher safe and easy to clean by hand. They are also designed with a hanging loop for easy storage.
Versatile Design - The sleek and simple design of these pan handle sleeves makes them suitable for use with a variety of cookware, including pots, pans, and skillets.
Quality Guaranteed - These pan handle sleeves come with a 5-year guarantee for your peace of mind.
description: From the manufacturer MasterClass Pan Handle Sleeve Set for Cast Aluminium Casserole Pots Protect your hands from burns and cook delicious food safely. This 3 piece set of silicone handle covers make it easier to manoeuvre our cast aluminium pots around kitchen. They're designed to fit all our aluminium casserole dishes- a range of lightweight and incredibly durable pots. A match made in heaven. Thanks to the non-stick coating, you don’t need as much oil, so you can fry your ingredients without the additional calories. Product Details Food-grade silicone Dishwasher safe Non toxic Heat resistant to 250℃ Handles for MasterClass' Induction-Safe Aluminium Cookware Equip yourself with MasterClass's induction-safe cast aluminium range, and start a cooking revolution in your kitchen! This innovative cookware is extremely tough, yet lightweight and easy to handle. Just what you need to cook with confidence, every day. The full collection includes frying pans, griddle pans and casserole dishes. Discover it for yourself – type 'MasterClass Cast Aluminium' into your Amazon search bar. Cook with Confidence. Includes 2 side handle covers These little protectors fit neatly over the handles to offer a comfortable grip And 1 knob cover The covers are made of non toxic, dishwasher safe silicone Easy to manoeuvre Fits all Masterclass cast aluminium casserole dishes.
